name: org.machanism.machai:machai-cli
description: Machai CLI (org.machanism.machai:machai-cli) is a Spring Boot + Spring Shell based Java command-line application (interactive REPL) for developer tooling in the Machanism/Machai ecosystem. It provides commands to (1) generate bindex metadata (bindex.json) for projects via directory scanning, (2) register generated bindex metadata into an external registry endpoint, (3) perform GenAI-assisted semantic search to pick relevant libraries by natural-language prompt and similarity score threshold, (4) assemble/scaffold an application skeleton into a target directory based on the prompt and selected bindex set, and (5) run Ghostwriter pipelines to scan and process files/directories using GenAI guidance. The CLI includes Ghostwriter "guidance" mode (gw) with configurable concurrency, excludes, instructions, guidance, and logging of LLM request inputs; and Ghostwriter "Act mode" (act) to run predefined interactive actions/prompts using ActProcessor. Configuration defaults are persisted via machai.properties (for example: default working/project directory, GenAI provider/model identifier such as OpenAI:gpt-5.1, semantic search score threshold, Ghostwriter properties like model/instructions/guidance/logInputs/scanDir), and an alternate properties file can be loaded at startup via -Dconfig. The CLI integrates with Machai bindex-core (BindexCreator, BindexRegister, Picker, ApplicationAssembly) and ghostwriter (GuidanceProcessor, ActProcessor) components, uses Maven libraries/resolver transports for artifact analysis, and uses SLF4J/Logback for logging. Typical operational workflows: bindex (scan/create/update metadata), register (upload metadata to registry), pick (semantic-search libraries), assembly (generate project using picked set), prompt (send ad-hoc prompt to provider), gw (scan/process with Ghostwriter guidance), act (interactive predefined actions), and clean (remove .machai temporary folders under a root directory).

usageContext: Non-interactive command execution (invoked via Spring Shell command methods)
Generating bindex.json metadata for artifacts/projects (directory scanning)
Registering bindex metadata to an external registry database/service
Semantic search and similarity-threshold based library picking using GenAI
GenAI-assisted application assembly/scaffolding using selected libraries
Ghostwriter guidance pipeline: scan/process directories or files with instructions/guidance, concurrency, and excludes
Ghostwriter Act mode: run predefined interactive actions/prompts using ActProcessor
Local workspace cleanup of Machai temporary .machai folders
Maven repository inspection and dependency/artifact coordinate resolution

constructors.description: Creates the command component for semantic search (pick), application assembly (assembly), and ad-hoc prompting (prompt). Initializes a PropertiesConfigurator and attempts to load machai.properties from the working directory; if not found, defaults are used. A LineReader is injected (lazy) for interactive prompting when query/instructions are omitted.

examples.snippet:
org.jline.reader.LineReader lr = null;
org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand(lr);
examples.description: Creates the command instance (typically managed by Spring Shell); when used outside Spring, a LineReader may be null but interactive prompting will then not work.

constructors.description: Creates the bindex command facade that generates bindex files and registers them into an external registry. Uses a PropertiesConfigurator instance for bindex-core operations; defaults are resolved from the shared ConfigCommand configuration.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (typically managed by Spring Shell) for generating and registering bindex metadata.

constructors.description: Creates the clean command component used to remove Machai temporary directories named ".machai" under a root directory resolved from configuration or the current user directory.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (typically managed by Spring Shell) for cleaning temporary folders.

constructors.description: Creates the configuration command component that reads/writes persistent CLI defaults to machai.properties via a shared static PropertiesConfigurator instance.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (typically managed by Spring Shell) that manages persistent configuration defaults.

constructors.description: Creates the Ghostwriter guidance command component. Uses an injected (lazy) LineReader to prompt for instructions/guidance when options are provided but empty. Resolves defaults from ConfigCommand and loads machai.properties via PropertiesConfigurator when available.

examples.snippet:
org.jline.reader.LineReader lr = null;
org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand(lr);
examples.description: Creates the command instance (typically managed by Spring Shell) for running Ghostwriter guidance processing.

constructors.description: Creates the Ghostwriter Act mode command component which runs predefined interactive actions/prompts through ActProcessor. It loads machai.properties when available and resolves the project directory and model from persisted configuration.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (typically managed by Spring Shell) for executing Act mode actions.

features.name: pick
features.signature: void pick(java.lang.String query, java.lang.String registerUrl, java.lang.Double score, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Performs GenAI-assisted semantic search to pick libraries (bindex artifacts) matching a natural-language query. If query is null, prompts interactively; if query points to an existing file, reads the prompt from that file. Uses a GenAI provider/model identifier resolved from configuration and delegates search to org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker; prints matched bindex IDs with similarity scores. Optionally uses a registry URL.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand((org.jline.reader.LineReader) null);
cmd.pick("Create a web app with REST and persistence", "http://localhost:8080", java.lang.Double.valueOf(0.9d), "OpenAI:gpt-5.1");
examples.description: Runs semantic search to pick libraries for the prompt with a minimum similarity score and an optional registry service.

features.name: assembly
features.signature: void assembly(java.lang.String query, java.io.File dir, java.lang.String registerUrl, java.lang.Double score, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Assembles an application/project in the target directory using a GenAI provider and a picked set of bindex artifacts. If query is omitted, reuses the last pick query and results; otherwise performs a new pick and then assembles. Delegates generation/scaffolding to org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly.

examples.description: Picks libraries for a prompt, then assembles a project into ./out using the previously picked bindex list.

features.name: prompt
features.signature: void prompt(java.lang.String query, java.lang.String chatModel, java.io.File dir)
features.description: Sends a free-form prompt to the configured GenAI provider/model, optionally sets a working directory, and prints the response. Loads provider tools via org.machanism.machai.ai.tools.FunctionToolsLoader.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand((org.jline.reader.LineReader) null);
cmd.prompt("Suggest a module structure for a Spring Boot app", "OpenAI:gpt-5.1", new java.io.File("."));
examples.description: Requests guidance from the GenAI provider and logs the returned response.

features.name: bindex
features.signature: void bindex(java.io.File dir, boolean update, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Scans a project directory and generates bindex metadata files, optionally updating previously saved data. Uses org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator configured with a provider/model identifier and a PropertiesConfigurator.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand();
cmd.bindex(new java.io.File("./my-project"), true, "OpenAI:gpt-5.1");
examples.description: Generates (and updates) bindex files for ./my-project using the specified GenAI provider/model.

features.name: register
features.signature: void register(java.io.File dir, java.lang.String registerUrl, boolean update, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Registers bindex files found under a directory to an external registry database endpoint. Uses org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister and supports update mode.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand();
cmd.register(new java.io.File("./my-project"), "http://localhost:8080", true, "OpenAI:gpt-5.1");
examples.description: Registers bindex metadata from ./my-project into the registry service at the provided URL.

features.name: clean
features.description: Deletes all Machai temporary directories named ".machai" under the specified root directory (defaults to the configured directory or the user directory). Useful for cleaning template/work directories created during assembly or processing.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.CleanCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.CleanCommand();
cmd.clean(new java.io.File("./my-project"));

features.name: gw
features.signature: void gw(int threads, java.lang.String model, java.lang.String instructions, java.lang.String guidance, java.lang.String excludes, java.lang.Boolean logInputs, java.io.File projectDir, java.lang.String[] scanDirs)
features.description: Runs the Ghostwriter guidance pipeline to scan and process directories or files using GenAI guidance. Supports concurrent processing (threads), custom instructions and default guidance (as text, URL, or file path), excludes list, scan directories, and optional logging of LLM request inputs. Delegates to org.machanism.machai.gw.processor.GuidanceProcessor and resolves defaults from machai.properties via ConfigCommand.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand((org.jline.reader.LineReader) null);
cmd.gw(1, "OpenAI:gpt-5.1", null, null, "target,.git", java.lang.Boolean.FALSE, new java.io.File("."), new java.lang.String[]{"./docs"});
examples.description: Processes ./docs with Ghostwriter, excluding target and .git directories.

features.name: act
features.description: Runs Ghostwriter "Act mode" by scanning the configured project folder and executing a predefined action/prompt interactively via org.machanism.machai.gw.processor.ActProcessor. The action name and optional extra prompt text are built from the provided tokens, defaults are resolved from machai.properties via ConfigCommand, and scanning uses a scanDir resolved from gw.scanDir or defaults to the project directory.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.ActCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.ActCommand();
cmd.act(new java.lang.String[]{"commit"});
examples.description: Runs the predefined "commit" action in Act mode (interactive).

features.name: config-set
features.signature: void set(java.lang.String key, java.lang.String value) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Sets or gets a persistent CLI configuration property stored in machai.properties. If value is null, prints the current value for the key; otherwise writes and saves the value.

examples.description: Sets the default semantic-search similarity score threshold and persists it to machai.properties.

customizations.name: machai.properties
customizations.description: Persistent configuration file used to customize default CLI behavior across commands. Common properties include default project/work directory (project.dir), default GenAI provider/model identifiers (for example: model, gw.model), default semantic search similarity threshold (score), Ghostwriter prompts (gw.instructions, gw.guidance), logging of LLM request inputs (gw.logInputs), and optional scan directory override (gw.scanDir).

examples.snippet:
model=OpenAI:gpt-5.1
project.dir=/path/to/workspace
score=0.9
gw.model=OpenAI:gpt-5.1
gw.excludes=target,.git
gw.logInputs=false
examples.description: Sets default model and project directory, semantic search score threshold, and Ghostwriter defaults.

customizations.name: -Dconfig
customizations.description: System property used at startup to point to an alternative properties file to be loaded into JVM System properties (defaults to machai.properties in the working directory). Implemented by org.machanism.machai.cli.MachaiCLI.loadSystemProperties().

examples.description: Starts the CLI and loads configuration properties from the provided file path.

examples.scenario: Pick libraries and assemble a project
steps: pick --query "Create a web app with REST API and persistence" --score 0.9 --registerUrl http://localhost:8080
